videos.title: FNSC Built for Speed 2014 xc ski race
videos.description: Foothills Nordic Ski Club put a fun day of xc ski racing for young athletes in January of 2014!  Watch the kids go wild at the Confederation Parks' bumps and jumps!

videos.title: Brent McMurtry - Winner SrM 10km classic 2012 Western Canadian Championships
videos.description: Brief interview with Brent McMurtry, winner of the Sr Mens 10km classic race at the 2012 Western Canadian Championships, Canmore Nordic Centre.
videos.transcript:
okay so ski tracks has caught up with
brent mcmurtry from the pierre harvey
training center and a member of
foothills nordic brent was the winner in
today's men's 10k classical race at the
western canadian championships uh
brent congratulations on your win today
thank you how was the racing out there
today it was it was good it was super
hard it's a really challenging course
there's probably
the first four or five minutes of
continuous climbing followed by
a hard flat section of the top so
three laps of a very tough hill and one
i i felt strong i pushed the face pretty
hard from the start and was sort of
holding on for dear life in the last lap
but i'm really happy with how i felt
happy that it warmed up about 15 degrees
from the last few days it's -15 doesn't
feel so bad when you used to minus 30 so
that's right that's right so what uh
what was your strategy for going into
your race today uh i just wanted to
focus on skiing smooth on the climb
the big hill wall or whatever it's
called is uh it's quite steep but
i i enjoy skiing it and i find that when
i'm feeling fresh i'm able to kick and
glide so i wanted to focus on continuing
to fly
as much as possible on all three laps
and i think you use a little bit more
energy to
have a powerful kick but i think that's
the way you're able to ski fastest right
so and you're the current leader of the
noram series right now is that right
yeah yeah it's a little confusing
there's like kind of two series this

the norem leaders so
that you drop a few races for the fist
regional series but uh
keep racing fast things will work out
right and once again ewan sandow uh
duking it out for the race today yeah
yeah it seems like that's sort of the
usual so there's all right
how many distance races are five races
maybe yeah four races five races
and one two on each of them so it's a
really good battle and yeah kevin's a
great guy and a guy i've known for a
long time growing up with foothills and
yeah it makes it fun so great i got to
be on my game to be in front of him
right okay well listen uh we'll let you
go uh congratulations once again and uh
best of luck in the rest of your races
this weekend

videos.title: Red Deer Nordic, November Training
videos.description:
The latest instalment of Red Deer Nordic's training videos: watch our November adventures in the snow! Big thanks, as always, to Altagas, for their continued support.

Song: "So Let's Go" by Alan Doyle

videos.title: Cross-country ski community prepares for Loppet Cup, state tournament
videos.description: The Cross Country Ski World Cup Tour is about to make its stop here in Minneapolis. This week also contains the high school cross country skiing state tournament. Ren Clayton caught up with a top prep skier as the sport reaches a boiling point.
videos.transcript:
it is now lit cup week the cross country
ski World Cup tour is about to make its
stop here in Minneapolis this week also
contains the High School cross country
skiing state tournament so I caught up
with a top prep skier as the sport
reaches a boiling
point a section cross country ski race
Victory meant beating a friend and a
rival just kind of surprised him with a
little Sprint at the end I was able to
take him down AJ wanmo was the top
finisher in section two and will ski at
State starting Wednesday I'm aiming for
top three ideally but obviously the goal
is to win I haven't really thought about
winning prior years but this year
there's a chance besides State the
Junior at Bloomington Jefferson is
looking forward to this weekend's lit
cup the long awaited Return of the World
Cup tour to the United States that's

since it's right here at home Hometown
and worldwide competition bringing the

usually when people see like here cross

videos.title: 2019 Lapham Loppet XC Freestyle and Classical Ski Race
tags: 2019 Lapham Loppet XC Freestyle and Classical Ski Race
videos.transcript:
but the weather did make for a perfect
backdrop for a cross-country skiing race
today at Lapham park in Delafield it's
so fun to be on the snow the 2019 Lapham
Lobeck got a little help from Mother
Nature soft mushy bass have real snow
the Lapham peak loop is just more than a
mile long and usually relies on man-made
snow to keep skiers going but the fresh
powder can also have a downside but the
fresh snow is pretty nice but I was kind
of struggling on some of the hills there
the skiers weren't just gliding along
today they were racing for some it's a
test of endurance I'm usually really
excited for a race I enjoy racing to see
how far I can push myself for others
it's a case of sibling rivalry just got
to beat my sister
make sure the race also serves as a
fundraiser for the park hoping to add
another half mile of trail in the woods
it's been a lot of years of working on
it but it's a wonderful thing now that
we've got it all I hope to get started
on the edition of that in the fall if
they raise 160 thousand dollars so some
perfect weather for the skiers today
